SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--STEVEN TAM. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DEBRA HALL JOLEN--ADJUSTER FOR GMAC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
